nodes.label: AI as tool for upskilling and staying relevant
nodes.label_negative: AI for creative generation from scratch
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't generally use Generative Fill to create things that aren't there in pictures per se

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI producing odd or unexpected results
nodes.grounding_span: Sometimes I feel the AI knows exactly what I need right away

nodes.label: Trust in AI for client communication
nodes.label_negative: AI creating fakes that could anger clients
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't want a client to be angry that something has been 'faked'

nodes.label: AI as efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: it really improved my workflow for that particular set of images

nodes.label: Client trust and credibility
nodes.grounding_span: I wouldn't want a client to be angry that something has been 'faked'

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for cleanup tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I was impressed by its ability to remove text from backgrounds

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I was less impressed by some of its more, say, surreal approaches

nodes.label: Mixed concern about AI replacing human authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I am nervous about it creating anything entirely from whole cloth

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: I would be interested to see how AI tools can assist with my video work

nodes.label: Iterative prompt refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I might change the way I phrase the prompt and see if this produces different results. Failing that, I would need to do the cleanup manually.

nodes.label: Collaborative testing and boundary exploration
nodes.grounding_span: we noticed its rollout with interest and had a play around with the tool when we got the update, testing its abilities and limitations
